form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Toulouse in the G3 October 27 over 1600m, 6 len behind Nerci D with 58kg at $10. Previously first up; ran last of 9 at La Teste De Buch in the G3 July 12 over 1900m, 23 len behind Motus De L'aigle carrying 58.5kg at $46. Among the main contenders.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming today after a break of five-and-a-half months. Previously first up; ran last of 9 at La Teste De Buch in the G3 July 12 over 1900m, 23 len behind Motus De L'aigle carrying 58.5kg at $46. Among the main contenders.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation 3rd of 7 at Toulouse on November 16 over 2100m, slow going 7 len behind Melodie Du Croate with 58kg at $3.10. When resuming last campaign 2nd of 13 at this track on September 8 over 1900m, slow going neck behind Thaqib De Monlau carrying 57kg at $7.80. Look for a bold run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Back from a spell. form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, 8th of 10 at Toulouse on March 1 over 2100m, 18 len behind Hilal carrying 54.5kg at $30. Cannot enthuse after the moderate debut effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Jumped at big odds at debut, 8th of 10 at Toulouse on March 1 over 2100m, 18 len behind Hilal carrying 54.5kg at $30. Cannot enthuse after the moderate debut effort.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 41-day let-up. First-up after seven months 3rd of 10 at Toulouse on March 1 over 2100m, 5 len behind Hilal with 58kg at $8.20. Previously second-up 5th of 13 at La Teste De Buch on August 20 over 1900m, 10 len behind Khalisa Du Soleil carrying 58kg at $9.10. Should progress from that first-up run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. Comes off a 41-day let-up. First-up after seven months 3rd of 10 at Toulouse on March 1 over 2100m, 5 len behind Hilal with 58kg at $8.20. form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 41-day let-up. First-up after three months 2nd of 10 at Toulouse on March 1 over 2100m, 3.5 len behind Hilal with 60kg at $9.10. Previously second-up 3rd in a small field at Toulouse in LR on November 23 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Fakhira with 58kg at $13. Sure to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. Comes off a 41-day let-up. First-up after three months 2nd of 10 at Toulouse on March 1 over 2100m, 3.5 len behind Hilal with 60kg at $9.10. form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 7th of 13 at Mont-de-Marsan on August 24 over 2000m, slow going 11 len behind El Bnoud carrying 56.5kg at $7.90. Solid return wouldn't surprise.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 7th of 13 at Mont-de-Marsan on August 24 over 2000m, slow going 11 len behind El Bnoud carrying 56.5kg at $7.90. Solid return wouldn't surprise.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a ten months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 10 at Langon-Libourne June 23 over 1800m, 4 len behind Inaya Grine with 54kg. On debut sixth of 8 at La Teste De Buch May 16 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Sa'ba carrying 55kg at $27. Happy to work around.

On debut sixth of 8 at La Teste De Buch May 16 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Sa'ba carrying 55kg at $27. Happy to work around.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding by Assy out of Nemesis Al Maury who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Worth considering if there is a move for him.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Four-year-old gelding by Assy out of Nemesis Al Maury who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Worth considering if there is a move for him.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Toulouse in the G3 October 27 over 1600m, 24 len behind Ts Waseema carrying 58kg at $3.80. On debut third of 12 at La Teste De Buch August 11 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Mahrouse carrying 54.5kg at $13. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at Toulouse November 16 over 2100m, soft track; 8 len behind Melodie Du Croate with 52.5kg at $21. On debut fifth of 11 at Castera-Verduzan September 28 over 1700m, 9 len behind Sienne Al Maury with 52.5kg. Marginal prospects.

form.formComment: Four-year-old entire by Al Safenne out of Namira Al Cham who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Might need the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Four-year-old entire by Al Safenne out of Namira Al Cham who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Might need the run.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 2nd of 9 at Pau All Weather on February 8 over 2000m, 1.3 len behind Nashmeeah Al Shahania carrying 56.5kg. Second-up 3rd of 14 at Mont-de-Marsan on March 23 over 2000m, 2.25 len behind Kiaora Du Soleil with 56kg at $4.60. Expected to go very well.
